Questions: "What is Indian Penal Code"

Questions: "which are the sections in IPC"
Answers:
"Here are the main sections of the Indian Penal Code (IPC):
Sections 1–52: General Explanations
Sections 53–75: Punishments
Sections 121–130: Offenses Against the State
Sections 141–160: Offenses Against Public Tranquility
Sections 295–298: Offenses Relating to Religion
Sections 299–377: Offenses Affecting the Human Body
Sections 378–462: Offenses Against Property
Sections 463–489: Forgery and Counterfeiting
Sections 503–510: Criminal Intimidation, Insult, and Annoyance"
